title: ProgressMessages
description:
Custom format strings are used to override the default localized progress messages for offline OData operations. Each property corresponds to a specific operation step and accepts a format string with placeholders.

Placeholders:
- {0} = current step number
- {1} = total number of steps
- {2} = step-specific value (varies by step)
- {3} = optional additional step-specific value (varies by step)

Note: Byte values are automatically formatted (e.g., 1.50 MB)

Step -> supported values:

ProcessingDefiningQueries:
- {2} = request name
- {3} = request URL

ProcessingRequests:
- {2} = request number
- {3} = total requests

ReceivingDataFromServer:
- {2} = received bytes

SendingDataToServer:
- {2} = sent bytes

DownloadingEntityStore:
- {2} = received bytes
- {3} = total bytes

SendingEntityStoreDatabase:
- {2} = sent bytes
- {3} = total bytes

BuildingEntityStore.description: Message shown when building the local entity store. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

CreatingBootStrapDatabase.description: Message shown when creating the bootstrap database. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

CreatingRequestQueueDatabase.description: Message shown when creating the request queue database. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

DownloadingEntityStore.description: Message shown when downloading the entity store from the server. Supports `{0}` (current step), `{1}` (total steps), `{2}` (received bytes), and `{3}` (total bytes).

ErasingExpiredRequests.description: Message shown when erasing expired requests. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

LoadingMetadata.description: Message shown when loading metadata. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

PerformingTransactionMerge.description: Message shown when performing transaction merge. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

PerformingCreateDeleteMerge.description: Message shown when performing create-delete merge optimization. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

ProcessingDefiningQueries.description: Message shown when processing defining queries. Supports `{0}` (current step), `{1}` (total steps), `{2}` (request name), and `{3}` (request URL).

ProcessingRequests.description: Message shown when processing requests. Supports `{0}` (current step), `{1}` (total steps), `{2}` (request number), and `{3}` (total requests).

ReapplyingChanges.description: Message shown when reapplying local changes. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

AnalyzingReceivedData.description: Message shown when analyzing received data. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

ReceivingDataFromServer.description: Message shown when receiving data from the server. Supports `{0}` (current step), `{1}` (total steps), and `{2}` (received bytes).

RemovingDeletedRelationships.description: Message shown when removing deleted relationships. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

RemovingRemoveAfterUploadRequests.description: Message shown when removing RemoveAfterUpload requests. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

SendingDataToServer.description: Message shown when sending data to the server. Supports `{0}` (current step), `{1}` (total steps), and `{2}` (sent bytes).

SendingEntityStoreDatabase.description: Message shown when sending the entity store database. Supports `{0}` (current step), `{1}` (total steps), `{2}` (sent bytes), and `{3}` (total bytes).

SendingRequestQueueDatabase.description: Message shown when sending the request queue database. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

UploadPreprocessing.description: Message shown during upload preprocessing. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).

WaitingForDownload.description: Message shown when waiting for download. Supports `{0}` (current step) and `{1}` (total steps).
